jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at HomeLane
jsonLd.description:
Join the HomeLane family as a SEO Specialist in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
